name: Tomato Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 package mixed pickling spices, tied in cloth
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the tomatoes, onions, pears, peaches, and apples.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil until thickened.
4. Pour into sterilized KERR jars and seal.
